steps.title: Substitute R equals 18 into the given equation
Square both sides to eliminate the square root
Isolate P cubed and solve for P
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $P^2$, then divide by 18:

$$C^2V^{4}=18P^3$$
$$P^3 = \frac{C^2V^{4}}{18}$$

Take the cube root of both sides:

$$P = \sqrt[3]{\frac{C^2V^{4}}{18}}$$

This matches choice C — C is correct.
